requirement_results.evidence: Strict external JSON adapter plus MarketContext.require_complete before replay; focused domain/adapter and replay suites passed.
Date-contained eligibility lookup and future-mutation regression passed.
Inclusive interval comparisons, separated context outcomes, blocked CLI runtime, and unsafe-position replay passed.
Unsafe positions process before ordinary exits/entries at same-day bar.low; independent two-run harness matched exactly.
Replay parity plus CLI, execute, broker, and AST boundary suite passed 70/70.
Successful PIT runtime replaces static-universe labels; context failures emit no report.
CLI/boundary suite passed; success, missing, invalid, incomplete, and blocked runtimes satisfy the machine-readable contracts.

sdd_verify_report.fresh_pytest_hash_note: Fresh raw pytest hashes differ from historical report hashes because raw output includes Python/plugin versions and elapsed durations; pass counts and scenario behavior match exactly.
sdd_verify_report.forced_close_hash_note: Independent harness output serialization differs from the historical ad hoc harness, while both prove identical forced-close reason and 10.20 price across two runs.

excluded_attempt.reason: Initial parallel uv commands raced while bootstrapping a missing environment; missing dependencies made those outputs invalid as candidate evidence.
excluded_attempt.resolution: Removed only the verifier-created ignored repository .venv, provisioned one external environment, and reran every required command from scratch.
